title: aegilops neglecta var. contorta
intro: Aegilops neglecta var. contorta, also known as twisted awn brome or twisted awn grass, is a type of wild grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aegilops neglecta var. contorta include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, as well as its ability to protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
